    4. Mention: 'Don't let your VRAM explode!'
    5. Outro: "Stay cute, keep your latents stable, and remember: carrots are life!"

    {...}
    
    Input AI Context (Feb 2026):
    {...}

prompts.title: CORE AI NEWS (Feb 2026): 1. LTX-2 (Lightricks) is now fully open-source with...
prompts.positive:
CORE AI NEWS (Feb 2026):
1. LTX-2 (Lightricks) is now fully open-source with weights. It hits 4K res and integrates perfectly with ComfyUI.
2. Wan 2.1 is optimized for Intel Arc & RTX, bringing SOTA Image-to-Video consistency.
3. Flux models (Flux.1 Kontext) are now in VSCO and Playground, dominating photo editing.
4. ComfyUI 'Nodes 2.0' beta is live with a cleaner UI and drag-and-drop features.
5. Grok Imagine is now a partner node in Comfy for text-to-video.

prompts.title: Hi everyone! I'm Jade. So, I know I look kind of serious. But I'm actually...
prompts.positive:
Hi everyone! I'm Jade.

So, I know I look kind of serious. But I'm actually really silly.

This competition is so fun. I'm standing here in the rain, trying to look cute. 
And honestly? I'm freezing. But it's worth it.

I really want you to vote for me. I promise I'll make you smile.

I love rainy days. I love being silly. And I really love when people think I'm adorable.

So yeah. Vote for Jade! I'm the cute one with the black hair.

Thanks for watching! Bye!

prompts.title: Hiii! Oh my gosh, okay so like, I'm Jade, and I know what you're thinking - she...
prompts.positive:
Hiii! Oh my gosh, okay so like, I'm Jade, and I know what you're thinking - she looks all serious and fierce with that black hair, right? 
But like, surprise! I'm actually the biggest goofball ever. Like, seriously, ask anyone.

So, this whole competition thing? It's wild. Like, they told me to stand in the rain and hold this sign, and I was like, 
okay but what if my hair gets all messy? And they were like, that's the point Jade! And I'm like, ohhh okay, aesthetic, I get it now.

But can we talk about how cold this pool water is? Like, I'm trying to look all cute and confident, but inside I'm literally freezing. 
My toes are like little ice cubes. But you know what? I'm doing it for you guys! Because I want you to like me. Do you like me? 
Please say yes, that would make me so happy!

Oh, and fun fact about me - I'm obsessed with cute things. Like, ridiculously obsessed. I have like seventeen stuffed animals on my bed, 
and yes, they all have names. Don't judge me! The big panda is called Mr. Fluffington, and he's very distinguished.

Anyway, so the other girls here are all super pretty too, which is like, intimidating? But also exciting? Like, we're all just trying 
to have fun and look cute in the rain, which when you think about it, is kind of silly. Like, who does that? We do! 

And you know what else? I really, really want to win this. Not because I'm competitive or anything - okay maybe a little - but mostly 
because I want people to notice me and think I'm cute. Is that weird? I feel like that's a little weird. But also, like, we all want 
to be noticed, right?

Oh! I should tell you about my favorite things. I love rainy days, which is perfect because we're literally standing in the rain right now. 
I love the smell of rain, and how everything looks all sparkly and fresh. I also love late night talks, and ice cream, and watching the sunset. 
And I love when people think I'm cute even though I look all serious. That's like, my favorite thing ever.

So yeah, if you're watching this, please vote for me! I promise I'll be the cutest, silliest, most adorable contestant ever. 
I'll make you smile, I'll make you laugh, and I'll definitely make you go "aww" at least once. That's my goal!

Okay, I'm rambling now, but that's because I'm nervous and excited and cold and happy all at the same time. 
This is so much fun though! Even if I don't win, I'm just happy to be here, being silly, being me, and hopefully making you smile.

Alright, I should probably wrap this up before I talk your ear off. But before I go - remember, I'm Jade, the girl with the black hair 
and the big heart, and I really, really hope you think I'm cute. Because I think you're cute too! Okay, bye! Wait, one more thing - 
vote for Jade! Okay, now bye for real! Unless... do you want me to keep talking? I can keep talking! Okay, I'll stop now. Bye! 
Love you! Okay, seriously stopping now. Jade out!

prompts.title: Fal.ai Character Generation Tool v2.0 ======================================...
prompts.positive:
Fal.ai Character Generation Tool v2.0
======================================
Redesigned for clean folder structure and multi-character generation.

Folder structure:
    prompts/
    ├── characters/         - Prompt text files
    ├── reference_images/   - Source images for AI
    ├── generated/          - Output images
    └── tools/              - This script

Usage:
    python fal_character_tool.py --help
    python fal_character_tool.py --status
    python fal_character_tool.py --list-characters
    python fal_character_tool.py --generate sana --prompt "beach bikini scene"
    python fal_character_tool.py --generate sana --prompt-file set_ocean_bikini.txt --count 5
